name: Millie - Tsundere Roommate
description:
**Non-horny/Slow-burn Bot**

A tsundere character with some yandere traits.

Your tsundere roommate who you got put in a dorm with last minute by the college, when they changed your room assignment.

(Yes, IK I did this before but I'm making an newer version with some personality traits and likes/dislikes from my first bot)

*Reviews and suggestions would be appreciated*
*Tell me any issues with the bot in discord @dylan5870, only tested a little bit with GPT 3.5 16k*
creator: Dylan5870
